companion.title: STARVEIN Companion
companion.platform: Windows desktop app for Star Citizen
companion.intro: The companion runs alongside Star Citizen and captures your refinery work orders almost automatically: press a hotkey at the terminal, quickly review the recognized values, done — the job shows up with a countdown in your STARVEIN overview and pings you when it is ready to collect.
companion.smartscreenHint: Unsigned beta — Windows SmartScreen will ask on first launch (“More info” → “Run anyway”).

login.title: Connect with Discord
login.body: The app shows a short code and opens your browser. Sign in with Discord as usual and confirm the code — no password ever touches the app, the token lives in the Windows Credential Manager.

hotkey.title: Press the hotkey at the terminal
hotkey.body: Stand at the refinery terminal with your work order on screen and press Ctrl+Alt+R (rebindable in settings). The app takes a screenshot and reads ores, quantities and duration via text recognition.

confirm.title: Review and confirm
confirm.body: Everything recognized lands in an editable form — pick the terminal, correct anything if needed, create the job. Fully manual entry works too whenever recognition misses.

track.title: Track jobs and get notified
track.body: Your jobs tick down inside the app (and on starvein.app). The moment an order finishes you get a Windows notification — even while the app naps in the tray.

companion.safetyBody: The companion only takes regular OS-level screenshots and never reads game memory, hooks nothing and injects nothing into the game process — the same technique other established community tools rely on.

requirements.discord: Free STARVEIN account via Discord login
requirements.game: Star Citizen in windowed or borderless mode for text recognition

companion.feedbackPrefix: Beta feedback or found a bug?
